title: HDR Capture, Cubemap Filtering & HDRI
description: Covers HDR panoramic capture workflows, equirectangular-to-cubemap conversion, specular cubemap filtering pipelines (importance sampling, pre-filtered radiance), and the reflection capture system that refreshes local reflection probes at runtime in Unreal and DECIMA. Local reflection captures are essential for interior environments where a distant skybox cannot provide accurate specular reflections. Students will implement a full offline cubemap filtering pipeline, integrate local reflection captures into the GP Engine's IBL system, and handle blending between overlapping capture volumes.
